task: Create a single index.html file with a heading, a short paragraph, and a contact link. Use semantic HTML and basic accessibility (lang attribute, alt text if images).

accessibility.agentComment: lang attr, semantic HTML (main, h1, p), visible focus styles, descriptive link text. Missing skip-nav and screen reader testing.

performance.agentComment: Single file, zero external requests, system font stack, no JS. Near-instant load.

architecture.agentComment: Single file with inline styles. Semantic structure but no separation of concerns.
